title: calochortus luteus
intro: Calochortus luteus, also known as the Golden Mariposa Lily, is a perennial plant species in the lily family (Liliaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Calochortus luteus include reducing inflammation, soothing sore muscles, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams for its medicinal and health benefits.
